stories.title: Round 1 is over ... so let's predict Rounds 2-3: Miller's quick-turn NFL mock draft for Day 2
stories.summary: Where will the best players still on the board land on Day 2? We projected the next 68 picks of the NFL draft.

stories.title: The best team fits for Day 2: Solak finds 10 matches that need to happen
stories.summary: Anthony Hill Jr. to the Cowboys? Avieon Terrell to the Bengals? Chris Bell to the 49ers? These second- and third-round team fits just make too much sense.

stories.title: Michigan lands 7-foot-2 Cincinnati transfer Thiam
stories.summary: Cincinnati transfer Moustapha Thiam, one of the best available players left in the portal, has committed to Michigan, he told ESPN's Shams Charania on Friday.

stories.title: Love favored for ROY, followed by Tate, Mendoza
stories.summary: New Cardinals running back Jeremiyah Love is the favorite to win offensive rookie of the year ahead of Carnell Tate and Fernando Mendoza. Jets defensive end David Bailey leads the odds for defensive rookie of the year.

stories.title: Peterson enters NBA draft after one season at KU
stories.summary: Kansas star freshman Darryn Peterson is entering the 2026 NBA draft, where he is expected to be one of the top picks.
